scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:electron" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.dev:electron: cd apps/desktop && wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run dev
scripts.build:backend: cd apps/backend && python -m pip install pyinstaller && python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean rabbit-hole-backend.spec
scripts.package: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && cd apps/desktop && npm run dist
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if (!process.env.CI) { require('child_process').execSync('cd apps/desktop && npx electron-builder install-app-deps', {stdio: 'inherit'}) }"
